summary.next_step: Acquire approved inputs and truth assets with checksums, then run the mapped analysis command for each target before claiming public-finding confirmation.

rows.public_finding: HG008-T is the first Cancer GIAB tumor sample and should be analyzed as the tumor member of the HG008 tumor-normal WGS pair.
rows.pass_gate: status passed sample_id HG008-T role tumor reference build compatible
rows.no_call_policy: No-call until HG008-T WGS input files are approved downloaded checksum verified and run.

rows.public_finding: HG008-N-D is a paired normal sample for the HG008 tumor and should be analyzed as the normal member of the HG008 tumor-normal WGS pair.
rows.pass_gate: status passed sample_id HG008-N-D role normal reference build compatible
rows.no_call_policy: No-call until HG008-N-D WGS input files are approved downloaded checksum verified and run.

rows.public_finding: HG008-T bulk RNA-seq should validate RNA intake and quantification plumbing but is not an HRD-positive truth label.
rows.pass_gate: status passed RNA FASTQ validation and quantification QC passed
rows.no_call_policy: No-call until HG008-T RNA files are approved downloaded checksum verified and run.

rows.public_finding: NIST HG008-T v0.3 somatic small-variant benchmark should support SNV indel recall and precision measurement inside callable regions.
rows.pass_gate: status passed recall precision and reference compatibility reported
rows.no_call_policy: No-call until HG008 small-variant truth assets and WGS inputs are approved downloaded checksum verified and run.

rows.public_finding: NIST HG008-T v0.5 somatic SV and CNV benchmark should support reciprocal-overlap SV and CNV correctness summaries.
rows.pass_gate: status passed SV and CNV reciprocal-overlap summaries reported
rows.no_call_policy: No-call until HG008 SV/CNV truth assets and WGS inputs are approved downloaded checksum verified and run.

rows.public_finding: COLO829 is a metastatic melanoma tumor cell line in a documented matched tumor-normal reference standard and should be analyzed as the tumor member.
rows.pass_gate: status passed sample_id COLO829 role tumor reference build compatible
rows.no_call_policy: No-call until COLO829 tumor WGS input files are approved downloaded checksum verified and run.

rows.public_finding: COLO829BL is the matched lymphoblastoid normal line for COLO829 and should be analyzed as the normal member.
rows.pass_gate: status passed sample_id COLO829BL role normal reference build compatible
rows.no_call_policy: No-call until COLO829BL normal WGS input files are approved downloaded checksum verified and run.

rows.public_finding: The COLO829 Zenodo truth set provides final somatic SV truth and copy-number alteration files for independent SV/CNA benchmarking.
rows.pass_gate: status passed SV and CNA reciprocal-overlap summaries reported
rows.no_call_policy: No-call until COLO829 SV/CNA truth assets and WGS inputs are approved downloaded checksum verified and run.

rows.public_finding: Selected COLO829 dilution levels should show lower variant or truth-overlap sensitivity as tumor fraction decreases.
rows.pass_gate: status passed purity recall table reported and monotonicity checked
rows.no_call_policy: No-call until selected COLO829 purity inputs labels and truth assets are approved downloaded checksum verified and run.

rows.public_finding: Seraseq ctDNA MRD Panel Mix includes 0 percent 0.5 percent 0.05 percent and 0.005 percent tumor fractions for MRD positive-negative and dilution validation.
rows.pass_gate: status passed 0 percent negative positive tumor fractions detected within assay limits
rows.no_call_policy: No-call until Seraseq material or variant files are obtained and assay-specific acceptance ranges are established.
